news.t: 6 Meridian Expands ETF Lineup With Launch of New Quality Growth Strategy (“SXQG”)

holdings.infoBox: SXQG is an equity ETF with a total of 95 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 6.08%, NVIDIA at 5.67%, Apple at 5.65%, Eli Lilly and Company at 4.96%, and Microsoft at 4.68%.

overview.description: The ETC 6 Meridian Quality Growth ETF (SXQG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively-managed fund of US-based companies that exhibit high quality and growth characteristics relative to their peers. SXQG was launched on May 10, 2021 and is issued by Exchange Traded Concepts.

data.title: 6 Meridian Expands ETF Lineup With Launch of New Quality Growth Strategy (“SXQG”)
data.text: SXQG is an active strategy designed to offer exposure to stocks exhibiting higher growth metrics based on a proprietary quant screening approach
